subject: [PATCH 00/14] nfsd/sunrpc: add support for netlink upcalls for mountd/exportd

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: There is no review comment from Jeff Layton in the provided thread.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for netlink upcalls to the NFS server and client, replacing antiquated interfaces in /proc. The new mechanism uses a generic netlink family and allows for more flexible and efficient handling of cache updates.
